titleStmt.title: SII 9.678: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 678. (A.R. No. 11 of 1904.) ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1485, Rudhirōdgāri, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 2, corresponding to A.D. 1563 August 5, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya who was ruling at Vidyānagara. It records that Nammāḷvārulu of the Viṭhala temple made a gift of some lands to the treasury of god Viṭhaladēva for sending to him, every day with music band, the offerings made to the god in the morning.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīmatē rāmānujāya namaḥ . svastiśrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśaka varuṣaṁgaḷu 1485 neya rudhirōdgārisaṁvatsarada śrāvaṇa ba 2 lu śrīmatu rājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyaru ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi vidyānagaradalū pruthvīsāṁbrā
jyaṁgaiuttaṁ yiralu śrīmatu purāṇapuruṣōttama bhaktavachala Anēkakōṭibrahmaṁḍanāyakarāda śrīviṭhaladēvara śrībhaṁḍārake śrīviṭhalada naṁmāḷvārulu sāṣṭāṁgaveragi puliUṭu kaṭida kramaveṁteṁdare svāmige Udeya vēḷeyalū Ārōgaṇeyāgi prasāda śaḍagō
pa tirumāleya prasādavanū sakalavādya sahitavāgi namage kaḷuhuvudake kaṭṭida puliveṭu vivarā di 1 ke dōseya paḍi 1 ke yaṇike 5 ke Akkiyapa 7 ke ca ¥ ... 0 Uddupa 3 ke ¥ . 0 Uppu pa . 0 jīrageyapake ¥ 2 doḍatu 2 paṁ . ke ¥ 2 sakhare pa 0 . saṁṇatu pa 0 . ke ¥ 2 Aḍugabu Aḍagū
li hiṭukuṭṭuva kūli . ¥ 0 Ādōseya paḍi 1 ke ca ¥ 2 . 0 . prāku guḍiya kaṭaḷeyilū naḍava doḍakiya prasāda pa 1 �yo dōseya puliUṭina saṁgaḍa dadhyōṁnava kalisi kaḷuhuva saṁmaṁdhā mosuru saṁbārada kraya ¥ . Ubhaya di 1 kkaṁ ¥ 2 . 0 llū tiṁgaḷu 1 ke caga 70
varuṣa 1 ke caga kalupaḍi 6 ke ga 1 . 0 śuddha caga 88 . 0 ke sale 1 ke caga 1 ¥ 4 ... lū ga 60 Akṣāradalū ghaṭṭi Aruvattu varahake svāmiya bhaṁḍārake samarpisidu namage kaṁpileya māgaṇiya rāmasāgaradalū saluda mā(ṁ) nyada gade kha 32 ke kuḷa gauḍa subaṁ
ṇana cauḍana kuḷada gade 2 hūliya heggaḍeya kuḷagade 2 . Ubhayaṁ kuḷa 2 ke gadeya bījavari Akṣaradalū haṁneraḍu koḷagada gaddeya voḷagaṇa māu sahā sakala Urakṣa suvarṇādāya birāḍa Āya sāṁmya modalāda rokka dhānya sahavāgi sarvamānyavāgi samarpiside vāgi yī
śilāśāsanadali bareda pulivaṭṭu prakāradali Ācaṁdrārkastāyiyāgi dēvaru namage naḍasikoṁḍubara cittaisuvudu ślōka . svadattāddviguṇaṁ
puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā yōharēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭivaruśasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . yēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhōjyā na karagrāhyāṁ vipradattā vasundharā .
Digital edition of SII 9.678 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
